Metadata.title: dRide — Decentralized Uber | Driver keeps 90%
Metadata.description: The first decentralized ride-sharing app. Transparent payments on Solana. Fixed 10% fee. Driver keeps 90%.
Metadata.keywords: decentralized uber, ride sharing crypto, solana, dride, blockchain ride
Metadata.ogDescription: Driver keeps 90%. Smart contract on Solana.

Hero.subheadline2: Transparent payments on Solana. Fixed 10% fee.

Problem.title: Uber takes 40% of your ride.
Problem.description:
In 2024, Uber's average fee reached 42%.
On a $20 ride, the driver gets $12.
The rest pays for offices in 70 countries, 34,000
employees, lawyers, and shareholder profits.
You pay more. The driver earns less.
Problem.annualEnd: that could be received as direct payment.

Solution.description: dRide uses a smart contract on Solana as escrow. The rider deposits, the driver completes the ride, the code automatically releases: {driverPct}% to the driver, {protocolPct}% to the protocol.
Solution.description2: No offices. No thousands of employees. No secret algorithm deciding how much you earn. Open source. Auditable by anyone.
Solution.highlight: +$6 more for the driver per ride
Solution.feature1Desc: Funds locked in the smart contract
Solution.feature3Desc: Fixed 10% fee, visible on the blockchain

Tokenomics.title: Token $DRIDE — Governance + Utility

0.label: Presale & Public Sale
0.desc: 300M tokens. Presale price: $0.005. Unlock: 20% at TGE, 80% linear over 6 months.

1.label: Ecosystem & Rewards
1.desc: 250M tokens. Incentives for drivers and riders. Fee discount when using $DRIDE.

2.label: Team & Advisors
2.desc: 200M tokens. 1 year cliff, 4 years linear vesting. Long-term commitment.

3.label: Liquidity Pool
3.desc: 150M tokens. Locked on DEX (Raydium/Orca). Ensures liquidity from day 1.

4.label: Treasury/Reserve
4.desc: 100M tokens. Controlled by multisig (Squads). For partnerships, grants, and emergencies.

Tokenomics.utility1: Pay rides with $DRIDE = {discount}% discount on the fee (10% to 5%)
Tokenomics.utility2: Staking: drivers stake to get priority in matching
Tokenomics.utility3: Governance: vote on fee changes, new features, new cities
Tokenomics.utility4: Revenue share: holders receive % of protocol revenue (v1.0)

Presale.walletWarning: You need to connect your Solana wallet to participate in the presale. The purchase will be made directly from your wallet.

Team.title: Who is building.
Team.joinDesc: We are always looking for exceptional talent who share our vision of a decentralized world.

0.question: What is dRide?
0.answer: A ride-sharing app like Uber, but decentralized. Instead of a company taking 40% of the ride, a smart contract on Solana automatically distributes: 90% to the driver, 10% to the protocol. No middlemen, no secret algorithm.

1.question: What is the $DRIDE token?
1.answer: It's the governance and utility token of the protocol. Holders can vote on changes, receive revenue share, and pay for rides at a discount. The token has 4-year vesting for the team, showing long-term commitment.

2.question: Do I need crypto to use the app?
2.answer: In the MVP yes, you pay in SOL. In version 0.2, we'll integrate PIX on-ramp: you pay with Pix and the app automatically converts to SOL.

3.question: How does the smart contract ensure safety?
3.answer: The escrow contract is audited and the code is open source. Funds are locked in a PDA (Program Derived Address) that can only be released when the ride completes or is cancelled. Nobody — not even us — can touch the funds outside these rules.

4.question: When will the app be available?
4.answer: Beta on TestFlight in Q3 2026, App Store launch in Q4 2026. First in Porto Seguro, BA, then expanding to other cities.

5.question: How do I become a driver?
5.answer: Download the app, create your account, and activate driver mode. Register your vehicle (make, model, plate) and start accepting rides. No bureaucracy, no company approval needed.

6.question: What is a smart contract?
6.answer: A smart contract is like an automatic contract. Imagine a judge that never lies and always follows the rules. When the rider pays, the smart contract stores the money. When the ride ends, it automatically releases 90% to the driver. Nobody can change the rules or steal the money — it's all transparent on the blockchain.

7.question: What is an escrow contract?
7.answer: An escrow contract is like depositing money in a trusted secure vault. On dRide, when you request a ride, the money enters an 'escrow': it's locked, safe, until the ride ends. If it ends well, the driver receives it. If cancelled, you get it back. It's the safest way to pay without trusting a company — you trust the code.

Footer.disclaimer: $DRIDE is a utility token for use within the dRide protocol. Purchasing $DRIDE does not constitute an investment in securities. There is no guarantee of financial return. The project is in development phase and is subject to technical and regulatory risks. Do your own research (DYOR) before participating. This website does not constitute financial or investment advice.
